title: 三分化Day2·拉日训练
prompt:
A 2D flat vector illustration of a fitness infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio.
Character: A muscular 25-year-old Asian male, short fluffy black hair with highlights, thick dark eyebrows, long brown eyes, gentle warm smile, square face with clear jawline, warm tan skin. He wears a dark navy blue sleeveless athletic tank top with orange trim on the neckline and armhole edges. Well-developed biceps and deltoids visible.
Layout: Character in center taking up 50% of the space, standing confidently with arms crossed. Top 15% has title banner. Bottom 20% has three horizontal data badges with orange borders. Character is the visual focal point of this cover card.
Background: Light warm beige with dynamic radial speed lines.

[CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR TEXT RENDERING]
Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English.
- Top right brand: "练对了吗"
- Top left badge: "1/10"
- Main Title: "三分化Day2·拉日训练"
- Subtitle: "背部+二头+后束 全攻略"
- Badge 1: "💪训练目标"
- Badge 2: "⏱️45-60分钟"
- Badge 3: "🔥8个核心动作"
- Bottom banner: "背练不大？这篇帮你彻底解决！"

title: 背部肌群解剖
prompt:
A 2D flat vector illustration of a fitness infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio.
Clean design with no human character. Focus on data visualization, icons, and text layout.
Layout: Top 15% title area with dark blue background. Middle 75% has THREE large knowledge cards stacked vertically, each taking 25% height. Each card has a large emoji icon on the left and detailed Chinese text on the right. Clean educational style, like a textbook page.
Background: Light warm beige.

[CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR TEXT RENDERING]
Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English.
- Top right brand: "练对了吗"
- Top left badge: "2/10"
- Title: "背部肌群解剖"
- Subtitle: "知其然更知其所以然"
- Card 1: "🦴背阔肌：背部最宽大的扇形肌群，从腋下延伸到腰侧。决定背部宽度。负责肩关节内收和伸展。训练动作：引体向上、高位下拉。"
- Card 2: "🦴斜方肌：位于上背和颈部，分为上中下三束。负责肩胛骨上提、后缩和下沉。影响背部厚度。训练动作：杠铃划船。"
- Card 3: "🦴三角肌后束：位于肩关节后方，经常被忽视。负责肩关节外旋和水平外展。改善圆肩驼背。训练动作：绳索面拉、反向飞鸟。"
- Bottom banner: "了解肌群才能精准发力，念动合一是关键"

title: 训练原理
prompt:
A 2D flat vector illustration of a fitness infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio.
Clean design with no human character. Focus on data visualization, icons, and text layout.
Layout: Top 15% title area. Middle 75% has FOUR principle cards stacked vertically, each with a large icon (💡) and Chinese title + detailed explanation. Clean information design, no character.
Background: Light warm beige.

[CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR TEXT RENDERING]
Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English.
- Top right brand: "练对了吗"
- Top left badge: "3/10"
- Title: "训练原理"
- Principle 1: "💡推拉分化：将训练分为推日和拉日，让对抗肌群轮流休息，每个肌群一周练2次，增肌效率最高。"
- Principle 2: "💡渐进超负荷：每周逐步增加重量或次数，给肌肉新的刺激，这是增肌的唯一法则。不进步就是在退步。"
- Principle 3: "💡念动合一：训练时注意力集中在目标肌群，感受肌肉的收缩和拉伸，神经募集更多肌纤维，效果提升30%。"
- Principle 4: "💡离心控制：下放阶段慢速控制3秒，比快速放下多激活20%肌纤维，是增肌的秘密武器。"
- Bottom banner: "知其然更知其所以然，练对了才能事半功倍"

title: 热身准备
prompt:
A 2D flat vector illustration of a fitness infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio.
Clean design with no human character. Focus on data visualization, icons, and text layout.
Layout: Top 15% title area. Middle 75% has FOUR step cards stacked vertically, each with a large orange number circle (①②③④), exercise name, sets/reps data, and detailed instruction. Orange left border accent on each card. Clean list design, no character.
Background: Light warm beige.

[CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR TEXT RENDERING]
Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English.
- Top right brand: "练对了吗"
- Top left badge: "4/10"
- Title: "热身准备"
- Subtitle: "8分钟激活背部"
- Step 1: "①肩胛骨下沉激活 | 15次×2组：双手握杠悬挂，主动下沉肩胛骨，感受背阔肌启动。激活肩袖肌群，预防受伤。"
- Step 2: "②弹力带面拉 | 15次×2组：弹力带固定在面前，双手拉向脸部两侧，外旋手腕。激活后束和菱形肌。"
- Step 3: "③猫牛式 | 10次：四点跪姿，吸气抬头塌腰，呼气弓背低头。活动胸椎，增加背部活动度。"
- Step 4: "④哑铃直臂上提 | 12次×1组：仰卧，双手持轻哑铃过头，直臂拉到大腿位置。激活背阔肌。"
- Bottom banner: "冷启动背部容易受伤，充分热身效率提升20%"

title: 引体向上详解
prompt:
A 2D flat vector illustration of a fitness infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio.
Character: A muscular 25-year-old Asian male, short fluffy black hair with highlights, thick dark eyebrows, long brown eyes, gentle warm smile, square face with clear jawline, warm tan skin. He wears a dark navy blue sleeveless athletic tank top with orange trim on the neckline and armhole edges. Well-developed biceps and deltoids visible.
Layout: Character on the left (30% width) performing a pull-up motion, back muscles highlighted in yellow glow. Right side (65% width) has dense training data: data bar, 3 technique points, breathing, common mistake (red), progression options. Character demonstrates the exercise.
Background: Light warm beige.

[CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR TEXT RENDERING]
Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English.
- Top right brand: "练对了吗"
- Top left badge: "5/10"
- Title: "①引体向上（宽握）"
- Subtitle: "背部训练之王"
- Data: "4组×6-10次 | 休息90秒 | 背阔肌+斜方肌下束"
- Point 1: "💪肩胛骨先下沉再后收，带动身体上拉"
- Point 2: "💪想象胸部去碰杠，不是下巴"
- Point 3: "💪顶峰收缩1秒，感受背阔肌挤压"
- Breathing: "上拉呼气2秒 | 下放吸气3秒"
- Mistake: "❌身体摆荡借力→背阔肌刺激不足"
- Progression: "🔄进阶：负重引体 | 降阶：弹力带辅助"
- Bottom banner: "引体是背部之王，做不了就用弹力带辅助"

title: 杠铃划船详解
prompt:
A 2D flat vector illustration of a fitness infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio.
Character: A muscular 25-year-old Asian male, short fluffy black hair with highlights, thick dark eyebrows, long brown eyes, gentle warm smile, square face with clear jawline, warm tan skin. He wears a dark navy blue sleeveless athletic tank top with orange trim on the neckline and armhole edges. Well-developed biceps and deltoids visible.
Layout: Character on the left (30% width) performing a barbell row at 45-degree angle, back muscles highlighted. Right side has dense training data. Small angle diagram showing correct 45-degree body position with green checkmark vs wrong hunched position with red X.
Background: Light warm beige.

[CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR TEXT RENDERING]
Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English.
- Top right brand: "练对了吗"
- Top left badge: "6/10"
- Title: "②杠铃划船"
- Subtitle: "背部厚度关键"
- Data: "4组×8-10次 | 休息90秒 | 背阔肌+斜方肌中束"
- Point 1: "💪俯身45度，脊柱保持中立不弓背"
- Point 2: "💪肘贴身拉，用背阔肌夹的力量"
- Point 3: "💪杠铃沿大腿拉到肚脐，顶峰收缩1秒"
- Mistake: "❌弓背用腰发力→腰椎损伤"
- Self check: "自检：腰比背累就是错了！"
- Bottom banner: "俯身角度不对，练的是腰不是背"

title: 绳索划船+高位下拉
prompt:
A 2D flat vector illustration of a fitness infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio.
Clean design with no human character. Focus on data visualization, icons, and text layout.
Layout: Top 10% title. Middle divided into TWO equal sections (45% each) with a wavy divider. Top section: exercise ③ with icon, name, data, and detailed content. Bottom section: exercise ④ same format. Clean data-focused design, no character.
Background: Light warm beige.

[CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR TEXT RENDERING]
Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English.
- Top right brand: "练对了吗"
- Top left badge: "7/10"
- Title: "绳索划船+高位下拉"
- Subtitle: "背部厚度+宽度双杀"
- Top section: "③坐姿绳索划船 | 3组×10-12次 | 休息75秒：窄握把手，后拉时挤压肩胛骨像夹住一支笔。躯干固定不后仰，只动手臂。顶峰收缩1-2秒。❌不要身体后仰借力。"
- Bottom section: "④高位下拉（窄握）| 3组×10-12次 | 休息75秒：拉到锁骨位置，肘向后推。感受背阔肌从腋下到腰侧的全程收缩。下拉呼气，上放吸气。❌不要拉到肚子位置。"
- Bottom banner: "顶峰收缩1-2秒，背部感受翻倍"

title: 后束+手臂收尾
prompt:
A 2D flat vector illustration of a fitness infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio.
Clean design with no human character. Focus on data visualization, icons, and text layout.
Layout: Top 10% title. Middle 80% has THREE exercise sections stacked vertically (27% each), each with exercise name, sets/reps, and key points. Clean data layout, no character needed.
Background: Light warm beige.

[CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR TEXT RENDERING]
Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English.
- Top right brand: "练对了吗"
- Top left badge: "8/10"
- Title: "后束+手臂收尾"
- Subtitle: "面拉+飞鸟+弯举"
- Exercise 1: "⑤绳索面拉 | 3组×12-15次 | 休息60秒：后束主发力，想象手肘去碰耳朵后面。拉到脸旁时外旋手腕。❌不要用手臂拉，用后肩带动。"
- Exercise 2: "⑥反向飞鸟 | 3组×12次 | 休息60秒：三角肌后束孤立动作。肩胛下沉别耸肩。❌耸肩代偿导致斜方肌上束发力过多。"
- Exercise 3: "⑦⑧锤式+反握弯举 | 各3组×10-12次：拉日收尾动作，别练太多，背才是主角。大拇指朝上握哑铃，靠墙防借力。"
- Bottom banner: "后束强=体态好，圆肩驼背的克星"

title: 4大避坑雷区

- Pitfall 1 red: "❌只练背不做后束→圆肩驼背"

title: 4周训练计划
prompt:
A 2D flat vector illustration of a fitness infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio.
Clean design with no human character. Focus on data visualization, icons, and text layout.
Layout: Top 10% title. Middle 60% has FOUR week cards stacked vertically, each with different color accent (week1 blue, week2 green, week3 orange, week4 gray) showing training schedule. Bottom 20% split into nutrition advice (left) and safety warning (right). Clean table/chart design, no character - this is a data card.
Background: Light warm beige.

[CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR TEXT RENDERING]
Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English.
- Top right brand: "练对了吗"
- Top left badge: "10/10"
- Title: "4周训练计划"
- Subtitle: "渐进超负荷+饮食安全"
- Week 1 (blue): "📅第1周·适应期：引体4组×6次+划船3组×8次 | 建立动作模式，不追求重量"
- Week 2 (green): "📈第2周·提升期：引体4组×8次+划船4组×10次 | 适当增加重量或次数"
- Week 3 (orange): "🔥第3周·突破期：引体4组×10次+划船4组×10次加重 | 冲击个人最佳"
- Week 4 (gray): "😴第4周·减载期：引体3组×8次+划船3组×8次减重 | 让身体充分恢复"
- Nutrition: "🥗蛋白质1.6-2.2g/kg | 练后30分钟补蛋白+碳水 | 睡眠7-8小时"
- Safety: "⚠️肩袖损伤/腰突/高血压不适合 | 锐痛头晕手麻立即停 | 每周2次间隔48小时"
- Bottom banner: "渐进超负荷是增肌唯一法则，每周进步一点点"
